nodes.summary: WisdomTree Investments (NYSE: WT) through its subsidiaries in the U.S. and the U.K., is an exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) sponsor and index developer, headquartered in New York City. WisdomTree launched its first ETFs in June 2006. WisdomTree, through its rules-based methodology used to select and weight companies in its ETFs, offers its funds in a variety of asset classes spanning equities, fixed income, currencies, alternatives and commodities. Flexpoint fully exited its position in 2016.
